title: calophyllum roseocostatum
intro: Calophyllum roseocostatum, also known as the Rose Costatum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum roseocostatum, including extracts and oils, can be used topically or taken internally, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
